2345000.name: Vertical Quest
2345000.description:
In Vertical Quest, you control a hero on a daring mission to conquer a mysterious tower filled with ever-changing floors, each presenting unique challenges. As you ascend the tower, you'll face increasingly difficult obstacles and enemies. Master these challenges to reach the top and defeat the powerful final boss!

Key Features:

  • Engaging Rogue-like Gameplay: Conquer the tower with limited energy, gather resources, and level up your character during a run, but be prepared to lose your progress if your energy runs out.
  • Resource Management: Collect Aether and Gold during challenges to level up your character and purchase equipment, respectively.
  • Upgradeable Equipment: Use Gold to buy and upgrade gear at the base camp, enhancing your hero's abilities and increasing your chances of success.
  • Compelling Boss Battles: Face off against powerful bosses on your way to the top, testing your skills and strategy.
